description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a CONTAINER_IMAGE variable set to registry.gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_PATH. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job in the build stage that runs the before_script to log in to the registry, then executes: docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true, docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest ., docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_BUILD_REF and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest. Also add a build-tag job in the same stage that runs only on tags and executes: docker pull $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest || true, docker build --cache-from $CONTAINER_IMAGE:latest --tag $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG ., and docker push $CONTAINER_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_TAG.
